title: Hegseth Again Threatens Attacks on Iran’s Civilian Infrastructure
summary_full: The U.S. blockade of shipments through the Strait of Hormuz would last “for as long as it takes,” the defense secretary said.
summary_public: The U.S. blockade of shipments through the Strait of Hormuz would last “for as long as it takes,” the defense secretary said.
